ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ischanged(Status__c) &&( (ispickval(Status__c,"Pipeline") && ispickval(priorvalue( Status__c),"In Process")) || (ispickval(Status__c,"In Process") && ispickval( priorvalue(Status__c),"Completed")) || (ispickval(Status__c,"Pipeline") && ispickval(priorvalue( Status__c),"Completed")) ) && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Status Could not be rolled back
